name: companion-module-tenveo-ptz
description: Bitfocus Companion module for Tenveo PTZ cameras (VISCA over IP)

scripts.sync-manifest: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('./package.json','utf8')); const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('./companion/manifest.json','utf8')); m.version=p.version; fs.writeFileSync('./companion/manifest.json', JSON.stringify(m,null,'\t')+'\n'); console.log('manifest.json → '+p.version);"
scripts.test: node test/step-calibration.test.js && node test/axis-home-and-zoom.test.js && node test/backlight-focus-home.test.js && node test/focus-tracking.test.js && node test/realtime-publish.test.js && node test/expcomp-iris.test.js && node test/manifest-sync.test.js && node test/rotary-track-expcomp-toggle.test.js

author: Tenveo Companion Module Contributors
